description: Style Note shorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion. Product Details Black shorts with an elasticated waist that has a drawstring inside, two insert side pockets, white adidas patented stripes on the sides, embroidered logo below the left pocket and is engineered with Climalite technology Material and Care 70% cotton and 30% Polyester Machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, dry clean, tumble dry or bleach Flat dry in shade Cool iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
